title: Marlierea bipennis
taxonomy:
I can find the classification information about the plant Marlierea bipennis. 

Marlierea bipennis is classified under the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Myrtaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the myrtle family. The genus Marlierea belongs to the tribe Myrteae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The species is further classified as a shrub or small tree, characterized by its evergreen leaves and small, white flowers. The plant's classification reflects its close relationship to other myrtle family members, such as eucalyptus and guava.
